The Startups

Co-Founded · MedTech
MedSimX

Building the next generation of medical training simulators — human-like, feedback-driven, and connected. Making high-quality clinical skill training accessible to every medical student.

🏥 Active Venture
First Product
Uday
A CPR training mannequin bringing real-world realism to skill practice — paired with a mobile app for instant, intelligent feedback.
⚡
Pressure Feedback: Measures compression depth and force applied during CPR practice.
🤲
Hand Position Sensing: Detects correct vs incorrect placement in real time.
📱
Mobile App Integration: Live metrics, session recordings, AI-generated performance scores.
📊
Student Evaluation: Auto-generates post-session report — depth, rhythm, rate, accuracy.
▶
Paste your Google Drive / YouTube link below to embed demo video
Co-Founded · EdTech
Circuit
Crafters

Democratizing access to science, technology, and higher education for students who don't have easy access to these worlds.

⚡ Active Venture
→
Mission: Spreading awareness about science, technology, and higher education in pure sciences to underserved communities across India.
→
Approach: Hands-on workshops, demonstrations, and curated kits that make STEM tangible, exciting, and accessible.
→
Impact: Backed by a ₹1 Lakh Student Innovation Grant from IISER Bhopal's Innovation & Incubation Center for Entrepreneurship.
Robotics Workshop — Live Event
"Explore the innovator in you" — Product Kits
02 /

About Me

"Chemistry is not just a science — it's a lens through which I design solutions the world actually needs."

I'm a third-year BS-MS Chemistry student at IISER Bhopal — one of India's premier research institutions. But I don't just study chemistry. I build things with it.

From automating lab workflows to building medical simulation technology and AI-powered prosthetics, my work lives at the intersection of applied chemistry, electronics, and software.

I co-founded MedSimX to revolutionize medical training through realistic, feedback-driven simulators, and Circuit Crafters to bring STEM education to underserved communities.

—

04 /

Key Projects

001
Automated Column Chromatography ↗ Click to reveal
Programmed and tested a full automation system reducing total cost to $200. Includes dual grippers, automated fraction collector, and spot table — eliminating human error in compound purification.
AutomationESP32ChemistryRobotics
002
AI-Based Voice Controlled Prosthetic Hand ↗ Click to reveal
Developed GRASP — AI-powered, voice-controlled prosthetic hand with servo actuators, pressure sensors across finger segments, and adaptive grip strength prediction estimating required holding force.
AI / MLEmbeddedRobotics3D Printing
003
Cyclic Voltammetry Soil Sensor ↗ Click to reveal
Contributed to IISERB's electrochemical soil testing initiative — detecting soil nutrient profiles with precision and low cost using EmStat analyzers, enabling smart agriculture in rural India.
ElectrochemistrySensorsAgriculture
004
Colour-Changing Sulphur Detector — Kutch, Gujarat ↗ Click to reveal
A colour-changing chemical sensor detecting sulphur contamination during salt extraction in Kutch. Provides real-time visual feedback enabling immediate on-site quality decisions without lab equipment.
ChemistrySensorsSolidWorksSalt Industry
